name: smoke-single-turn
description: Phase 6.3 smoke: trivial single-turn no-tool. Proves harness end-to-end plumbing — both SDKs invoked concurrently, base-URL override threads through, transcripts captured. NOT the canonical set (6.5a's job). The script entry below uses a placeholder promptHash; the live SDK's actual hash depends on its internal request shape (system blocks, billing headers, etc.). In v1 we deliberately tolerate a script miss on the Anthropic side — the harness PLUMBING is what's under test, not round-trip success. 6.5a will productionize this scenario with real captured hashes.
